notes: Only championship 18-hole course on Koh Samui island. Edward Thiele & Pirapon Namatra design, 2003. Hosted 2006 Bangkok Airways Open. GPS confirmed from phuketgolfcourse.com/maps: 9.5600, 99.9766 (Mae Nam area, north Koh Samui). Official site santiburigolfsamui.com bundles all-in at 5,800 THB — caddie ladies drive carts (both caddie + cart mandatory). Itemized breakdown from phuketgolfcourse.com (2026): green fee 3,800 + caddie 350 + cart 750 = 4,900 THB. Early Bird (6-7 AM) rate 3,550 THB all-in. No clear weekday/weekend differential across any source. Multiple sources conflict on total (5,600 / 5,800 / 4,900) — likely reflect service charges and exchange-rate-era data. Phone: +66 77 421700. Club rental available (600-1,500 THB per set).

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — phuketgolfcourse.com 2026 itemized breakdown. Official site (santiburigolfsamui.com) bundles at 5,800 THB all-in. No weekday/weekend differential found.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — same as weekday; no differential confirmed across any source.

caddie_fee_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — phuketgolfcourse.com 2026. Caddie tip of 400-500 THB additional recommended but not included.

cart_fee_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — one cart per golfer mandatory due to steep terrain.

distance_from_bangkok_km.note: Koh Samui island — requires road to Surat Thani ferry + ferry crossing. Air: ~1.5 hours.

club_rental_fee_thb.note: Range 600-1,500 THB depending on set quality.
